name: daily-drive-workspace
description: If you are new to this project, here is the simple version: Daily Drive Workspace is a digital to-do list web page. It lets you type in tasks, pick a category for  (like Work or Study), check them off when done, and watch a green progress bar grow to 100% as you complete your goals. It automatically saves your list so your tasks don't disappear when you close or refresh your browser tab.
